texto: When the stars imploded billions of years ago, iron and silver, gold and carbon came raining down. And the iron from that stardust is in us today-in our mitochondria. Mothers pass on the stars and their iron to their children. Who knows, Jean, you and I might be made of the dust from one and the same star, and maybe we recognized each other by its light. We were searching for each other. We are star seekers.

frase_original: Yes, the woman." Cunco took a deep breath. "Women like her don't come along that often, you know. Maybe only every two hundred years. She everything a man could dream of. Beautiful, clever, wise, considerate, passionate--absolutely everything.

texto: We cannot decide to love. We cannot compel anyone to love us. There's no secret recipe, only love itself. And we are at its mercy--there's nothing we can do.
explicacao: Citação de Nina George sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “We cannot decide to love. We cannot compel anyone to love us. There's no secret recipe, only love…” articula amor, finding-love, vida em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como vida e love.

texto: Oh, merciless freedom, you continue to overwhelm me! You demand that I challenge myself and feel ashamed, and yet continue to feel so outrageously proud to live a life full of my desires.
explicacao: Citação de Nina George sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Oh, merciless freedom, you continue to overwhelm me! You demand that I challenge myself and feel …” articula vida, freedom, continue em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como vida.

texto: Tango is a truth drug. It lays bare your problems and your complexes, but also the strengths you hide from others so as not to vex them. It shows what a couple can be for each other, how they can listen to each other. People who only want to listen to themselves will hate tango.
explicacao: Citação de Nina George sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Tango is a truth drug. It lays bare your problems and your complexes, but also the strengths you …” articula reflexao, listening, tango em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como tango.

texto: Hey, Salvo," asked Max when they had almost fallen asleep. "May I write your story?""Don't you dare, amico" was Salvatore's reply. "Kindly come up with your own storia, young Massimo. If you take mine, I'll have none left of my own
